chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4576 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of CMA No.19072/2025 (Stay/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.19073/2025 (Inspection) 3. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 22.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Qadir Mirza, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, A.A.G. Mr. Mubarak Ali Shaikh, advocate for respondent-KDA ------------------------------------------ Leaned counsel for petitioner submits that the petitioner is being illegally evicted and he has filed his Online Complaint under the Smart Compliant Redressal Mechanism (SCRM). Director General, Sindh Building Control Authority is directed to decide the complaint of the petitioner in accordance with their SOPs, expeditiously. In the meantime, petitioner shall not be evicted. However, SBCA, after hearing the petitioner, shall comply with any orders passed by this Court in its constitutional jurisdiction. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, Sindh Building Control Authority, Karachi, for information and compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
